sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Sky Quarry (SKYQ) NASDAQ close $5.10 on 02 Apr 2026: Apr 7 earnings could reset valuation
feed.summary: Sky Quarry Inc. (SKYQ) stock closed at $5.10 on April 2, 2026, after a significant intraday jump and high trading volume. The company is set to report Q1 earnings on April 7, 2026, which is expected to be a major catalyst for its future stock performance. Despite the recent price surge, the article highlights weak fundamentals, including negative EPS, high debt, and low current ratio, leading Meyka AI to rate it a "HOLD" with a negative one-year projection.

feed.title: Safehold (SAFE) CEO reports 23,662-share tax withholding, holds over 1.8M shares
feed.summary: Jay Sugarman, CEO of Safehold Inc. (SAFE), reported a disposition of 23,662 shares of common stock for tax withholding purposes on March 31, 2026. This action was taken to satisfy tax obligations related to the vesting of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and was not an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Mr. Sugarman directly holds 1,830,283 Safehold common shares, with additional indirect holdings through his spouse, family trusts, and a foundation.

feed.title: [Form 4] Senseonics Holdings, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Edward Fiorentino, a director at Senseonics Holdings, Inc. (SENS), reported an acquisition of 2,124 shares of common stock on April 1, 2026. This grant, valued at $14,124.60 at a price of $6.65 per share, was compensation in lieu of quarterly cash retainer fees. Following this transaction, Fiorentino directly holds 73,487 shares of Senseonics common stock.

feed.title: €148.90 SAP.DE (SAP SE XETRA) 02 Apr 2026: AI pivot offers selective opportunity
feed.summary: SAP.DE stock is trading at €148.90, down 26.45% year-to-date, presenting a selective opportunity for AI-focused investors despite a clear downtrend in price averages. The company's AI strategy, embedded in S/4HANA and the Business Technology Platform, positions it as an AI beneficiary, though execution risks and competition remain. Meyka AI predicts an 80.26% upside to a yearly target of €268.39, with a quarterly downside risk of -25.85% to €110.38, suggesting careful consideration around upcoming earnings.

feed.title: FDA Approves Extension of Dosing Intervals for Regeneron's Eylea HD
feed.summary: The FDA has approved extending the dosing intervals for Regeneron's Eylea HD up to every 20 weeks for patients with wet age-related macular degeneration (wAMD) and diabetic macular edema (DME) who have shown a successful response after one year. This update, based on 96-week data from the PULSAR and PHOTON trials, allows for individualized treatment plans, offering the broadest dosing range for an injectable anti-VEGF treatment. Regeneron is also awaiting FDA review for an Eylea HD prefilled syringe.

feed.title: Santacruz Silver Emerges Debt-Free, Poised for Strategic Growth
feed.summary: Santacruz Silver Mining Ltd. has achieved a significant financial milestone by completing its final payment to Glencore, effectively eliminating its acquisition debt. Despite a reported 74% drop in net income due to a non-recurring gain in the previous year, the company saw a 15% increase in revenue to $326.4 million and its adjusted EBITDA nearly doubled to $104.6 million, demonstrating strong operational performance and a strengthened balance sheet. With cleared debt and improved liquidity, Santacruz Silver is now focused on optimizing its asset portfolio, with particular attention to the Bolivar mine for future growth.

feed.title: 36Kr Exclusive: Ex-Thermo Fisher Employee Launches Lights-Out Lab with 100% Domestic Delivery, Secures Nearly $100M in Financing
feed.summary: Daina Technology, founded by ex-Thermo Fisher employee Chi Haipeng, recently secured nearly 100 million yuan in Series B+ financing to expand its "lights-out laboratory" technology. The company specializes in AI-driven, fully unmanned, and closed-loop laboratories for scientific research, achieving 100% domestic delivery success. Daina Technology plans to further develop its AI infrastructure for science, expand its market share, and collaborate with institutions like Beijing University of Chemical Technology to accelerate AI + new materials R&D.

feed.title: XBI ETF Holdings List — BMV:XBI
feed.summary: This article provides a list of the top holdings for the XBI ETF (State Street SPDR S&P Biotech ETF) as of March 26, 2026. It details the weight, share count, and market value in USD for each company within the fund's composition. Key holdings include Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, TG Therapeutics, and Alkermes Public Limited Company.

feed.title: RxSight management joins Needham virtual healthcare event Apr. 16
feed.summary: RxSight (NASDAQ: RXST) will participate in the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 16, 2026, with management hosting a fireside chat at 8:00 a.m. PT. While this event signals ongoing investor engagement, historical data suggests that conference participation announcements typically result in modest stock movements compared to financial updates or leadership changes. Investors are advised to focus on the company's execution against 2026 guidance and future operational milestones rather than this presentation for significant market impact.

feed.title: Range Resources to release Q1 results April 21, hold call April 22
feed.summary: Range Resources (NYSE: RRC) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 21, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on April 22, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, with a live webcast and archived replay available. Historically, similar announcements have led to modest, mixed stock reactions.

feed.title: Riot Platforms produces 1,473 bitcoin in first quarter
feed.summary: Riot Platforms (NASDAQ:RIOT) announced a 4% year-over-year decrease in Q1 2026 bitcoin production, totaling 1,473 coins, but sold 3,778 bitcoin for $289.5 million. The company's deployed hash rate increased by 26%, and it generated $21.0 million in power credits due to demand response programs. Despite stock declines, Riot Platforms is expanding into data center development and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis, even as analysts have adjusted price targets following Q4 2025 earnings.

feed.title: Remitly Global (RELY) Gets a Buy from Freedom Capital Markets
feed.summary: Freedom Capital Markets has initiated coverage on Remitly Global (RELY) with a Buy rating and a $20.00 price target. This positive outlook follows the company's strong fourth-quarter earnings, reporting $442.18 million in revenue and a net profit of $41.22 million, a significant improvement from the previous year. Despite positive analyst sentiment, corporate insider activity shows a negative trend, with an increase in share sales over the past quarter.

feed.title: Artemis II launches to the moon with components built in Rancho Cordova
feed.summary: The Artemis II mission to the Moon includes critical safety system components and rocket engines built and refurbished in Rancho Cordova and Sacramento, California. Engineers at L3Harris Technologies (formerly Aerojet Rocketdyne) developed the jettison motor for Orion's launch abort system, designed to ensure astronaut safety during launch. Additionally, the RS-25 engines and some steering thrusters used for the mission were repurposed from the Space Shuttle era, with origins and refurbishment ties to Sacramento.

feed.title: Better Quantum Computing Stock: D-Wave Quantum vs. Rigetti Computing
feed.summary: The article compares D-Wave Quantum and Rigetti Computing, two quantum computing companies whose stock prices have seen significant drops in 2026. While both are unprofitable and hold substantial cash reserves, D-Wave is presented as the superior investment due to its larger and growing revenue, higher cash balance, strong 2026 bookings, and a more favorable valuation based on its price-to-sales ratio. The article notes that investing in the nascent quantum computing sector requires a high risk tolerance.

feed.title: International Flavors & Fragrances Stock: Core Business Model, Market Position, and Investor Conside
feed.summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF) is a leading player in specialty chemicals, focusing on flavors, fragrances, cosmetic actives, and nutritional lipids. The company's core operations are driven by innovation in sensory experiences for consumer products, with a business model relying on proprietary technology, customer relationships, and vertical integration. Despite competitive pressures and raw material volatility, IFF differentiates itself through end-to-end capabilities and strategic acquisitions, positioning it as a compelling investment for North American investors seeking exposure to resilient consumer staples.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. stock: A cornerstone of pharmaceutical innovation and dividend reliability for long-term investors
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) is highlighted as a leading biopharmaceutical company known for its innovation, strong pipeline, and reliable dividends, making it attractive to long-term North American investors. The article details Merck's core business model, key products like Keytruda and Gardasil, and strategic initiatives focused on pipeline diversification. It also addresses financial health, relevance for investors, and potential risks such as patent expirations and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Mid-America Apartment Communities Stock: S&P 500 REIT Poised for Q1 2026 Earnings Amid Sunbelt Deman
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA), an S&P 500 apartment REIT, is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, with analysts predicting a 20.70% upside to an average target of $161.78. The company focuses on high-growth Sunbelt regions, benefiting from strong population inflows and job growth. MAA's strategy emphasizes operational efficiency, selective acquisitions, and development, providing stable cash flows and consistent dividend payouts for investors.

feed.title: Hock Tan Says Google Executive Amie Thuener Will 'Bring Deep Experience' To Broadcom As New CFO Amid $100 Billion AI Chip Revenue Push
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. has appointed Amie Thuener, a Google executive, as its new chief financial officer, effective June 12, succeeding Kirsten Spears. Thuener, with her background in financial reporting, corporate governance, and AI-related transactions, is expected to bring valuable experience as Broadcom pushes towards $100 billion in AI-related chip revenue. The company is actively collaborating with clients like Google and OpenAI to develop custom AI processors, positioning itself for significant growth in the AI sector despite market dominance by Nvidia.

feed.title: Quest Resource (NASDAQ: QRHC) director awarded 12,619 DSUs and holds 2.84M shares indirectly
feed.summary: Quest Resource Holding Corp director Daniel M. Friedberg was awarded 12,619 deferred stock units (DSUs) at $1.19 per share under the company’s 2024 Incentive Compensation Plan. These DSUs will convert to common stock upon his separation from service, bringing his total DSU holdings to 83,779 units. Additionally, Friedberg directly holds 49,085 common share interests and indirectly controls 2,842,353 shares through Hampstead Park Environmental Services Investment Fund LLC.

feed.title: Park National (NYSE: PRK) chair gains shares via PBRSUs and tax withholding
feed.summary: Park National Corporation chairman David L. Trautman engaged in compensation-related stock activity, earning 1,717.5 performance-based restricted stock units (PBRSUs) which converted into common shares and receiving a new grant of 2,212.5 PBRSUs. To cover tax obligations, 1,750.5169 common shares were withheld at $163.45 per share. Following these transactions, Trautman directly holds 47,112.0938 Park common shares and has additional indirect holdings.

feed.title: Plumas Bancorp price target lowered to $59 from $61 at Piper Sandler
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has decreased its price target for Plumas Bancorp (PLBC) to $59 from $61, while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares. This adjustment is part of broader changes to their Western bank coverage estimates and price targets, aligning with their Q1 preview for Regional & Community Banks.

feed.title: Marissa Mayer defers Walmart (WMT) director fees into new stock units
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. director Marissa A. Mayer has deferred her quarterly board compensation into 231 common stock units, granted on March 31, 2026, at a closing share price of $124.28. This transaction increased her direct holdings to 130,402.2532 units and shares, and the balance also includes phantom stock units acquired as dividend equivalents. The SEC Form 4 filing reports this as a compensation grant rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Devon Energy Corp Stock: Strategic Positioning in North American Oil and Gas Amid Market Volatility
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp (DVN) is a key player in the North American upstream energy sector, focusing on oil, natural gas, and NGL production in major U.S. basins like the Delaware and Eagle Ford. The company emphasizes a disciplined capital allocation, a fixed plus variable dividend framework, and strong financial health with low debt, attracting investors looking for domestic energy exposure. Analysts generally have a positive outlook, noting attractive valuation metrics and the company's resilience despite commodity price volatility and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc. stock: Navigating the shift to smoke-free products amid stable dividend appeal for North American investors
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. is strategically transitioning towards smoke-free alternatives, such as nicotine pouches, while maintaining its strong dividend yield, which appeals to income-focused investors. The company's recent rollout of On! PLUS nicotine pouches and its dominant position in the U.S. cigarette market, alongside its focus on high-margin products, underscore its commitment to sustained profitability and shareholder returns. Despite regulatory risks and declining cigarette volumes, Altria's financial health, product innovation, and stable dividend policy make it an attractive option for North American investors seeking defensive qualities and income in their portfolios.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Stock: Leader in Robotic Surgery Faces Evolving Healthcare Landscape
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISIN: US46120E6023) is a dominant force in robotic-assisted surgery with its da Vinci systems, generating steady growth through a "razor-and-blade" business model and continuous technological innovation. North American investors are drawn to its strong market position, recurring revenue streams, and potential for expansion in an evolving healthcare landscape, despite risks from competitive intensification and regulatory scrutiny. The article highlights the company's core business model, technological edge, and market dominance, advising investors to monitor procedure growth and innovation.

feed.title: Duke Energy rate hike proposal draws backlash at NCUC hearings
feed.summary: Duke Energy's proposal to increase electric rates over the next two years is facing significant opposition from customers across North Carolina during North Carolina Utilities Commission hearings. Residents expressed concerns over already rising winter energy bills and shared how a further rate hike would impact their budgets. Duke Energy, in turn, explained the necessity of the rate increase to fund investments in reliability, grid strengthening against storms, and supporting the state's growth.

feed.title: Transocean Ltd. Announces Contract Awards Totaling $1.0 Billion and Retirement of Senior Secured Notes
feed.summary: Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) has announced new contract awards and extensions totaling approximately $1.0 billion in incremental firm contract backlog for its harsh environment semisubmersible, the Transocean Barents, and two ultra-deepwater drillships, Deepwater Orion and Deepwater Aquila. Concurrently, the company also reported the full retirement of its 8.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2028 (Titan Notes), amounting to $358 million, which is part of their commitment to accelerate deleveraging and reduce interest expenses. Transocean expects to retire a total of $0.75 billion of debt in 2026, including this early retirement.

feed.title: Bitcoin miner Riot sold 3,778 BTC during Q1 amid profitability pressures
feed.summary: Bitcoin miner Riot Platforms sold 3,778 BTC in the first quarter for $289.5 million due to profitability pressures, despite producing 1,473 BTC. This aligns with a trend of other crypto miners selling Bitcoin amidst rising energy costs exacerbated by global conflicts. Experts suggest that less efficient miners are going offline, potentially leading to increased profitability for remaining operators if energy prices decrease or Bitcoin's value rises.

feed.title: Global X Variable Rate Preferred ETF Holdings
feed.summary: This article details the holdings of the Global X Variable Rate Preferred ETF (PFFV), which was established in 2020 by Global X and focuses on broad credit fixed income. The ETF manages $297.86 million in assets across 56 holdings, primarily tracking an index of variable rate US preferred securities. The content also provides a "Recent Changes" section, outlining modifications to the ETF's holdings since late 2023.

feed.title: Why OraSure Technologies, Inc. Shares Jumped
feed.summary: OraSure Technologies' shares jumped by as much as 15% after the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) proposed covering hepatitis-C tests for select high-risk patients. OraSure develops a rapid diagnostic test for HCV, making this potential policy change significant for the company's future revenue. If adopted, the proposal could boost OraSure's financial performance and encourage more baby boomers to get tested.

feed.title: ON24 (ONTF) director’s 141,095 shares cashed out at $8.10

His shares were converted into the right to receive $8.10 per share in cash, reducing his direct ownership to zero. This transaction was reported in an SEC Form 4 filing.

Options trading volume was average, with puts outnumbering calls (put/call ratio of 1.13), and implied volatility dropped to its lowest 10% range over the past year. This suggests an expected daily move of $2.59, and an increased demand for downside protection.

feed.title: Dr Reddys Laboratories Upgraded to Hold as Technicals Improve Amid Mixed Financials
feed.summary: Dr Reddys Laboratories Ltd has received an investment rating upgrade from Sell to Hold, effective April 2, 2026. This upgrade is attributed to improving technical indicators, attractive valuation metrics, and strong fundamental quality, despite recent quarterly financial setbacks. The company demonstrates robust long-term growth and high institutional ownership, leading to a cautiously optimistic outlook.

feed.title: Microsoft Readies $10 Billion AI Investment Plan in Japan
feed.summary: Microsoft has announced a four-year, $10 billion investment plan in Japan to bolster its cloud and AI infrastructure. This initiative is part of Microsoft's broader strategy to expand its AI services across Asia. Japanese companies Sakura Internet Inc. and SoftBank Corp. will collaborate by providing essential computing resources.

feed.title: Duke Energy Corp Stock: A Cornerstone Utility with Robust Growth Prospects in a Shifting Energy Land
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corp (ISIN: US2635341090) is highlighted as a leading U.S. utility provider offering stability and growth potential through its regulated electric and gas operations and a strategic shift towards clean energy. The article details its core business model, financial strength, and competitive position, emphasizing its appeal to North American investors for defensive stability and consistent dividends. It also addresses regulatory risks, climate events, and financing costs as key factors to watch for the company.

feed.title: Should U.S. Bancorp’s Expanded Embedded Lending And Amazon Card Deal Reshape USB Investors’ Expectations?
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has expanded its Avvance point-of-sale lending platform and secured a deal to take over Amazon’s small-business credit card program, previously held by American Express. These strategic moves bolster U.S. Bancorp's position in embedded finance and small-business payments, potentially boosting fee-based revenue. Investors are encouraged to consider these developments in the context of the bank's broader investment narrative, focusing on credit quality, operational efficiency, and customer experience.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Walter Winn Acquires Shares of Southland Holdings Inc (SLND)

This transaction increases his total holdings to 1,950,721 shares and is the only insider buy in the past year for the company. The stock is currently trading at $1.47, with a GF Value of $3.01, suggesting it might be a "Possible Value Trap, Think Twice."

feed.title: Southland (NASDAQ:SLND) COO Purchases $42,890.19 in Stock

feed.title: Schwab (SCHW) director granted 1,286 nonqualified stock options as board fees
feed.summary: Charles A. Ruffel, a director at Schwab Charles Corp (SCHW), received a grant of 1,286 nonqualified stock options on April 1, 2026, as part of his board compensation. These options, which vested immediately, allow him to purchase shares at an exercise price of $92.36 per share and were issued under the Directors' Deferred Compensation Plan II in lieu of cash fees. This transaction is categorized as a compensation-related award rather than an open-market stock purchase or sale.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of PepGen Inc. - PEPG
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against PepGen Inc. (NASDAQ: PEPG) on behalf of investors. This investigation follows a partial clinical hold by the FDA on PepGen's FREEDOM2-DM1 Phase 2 trial and subsequent disappointing clinical data, which led to significant drops in the company's stock price. Investors are encouraged to contact Pomerantz LLP for information regarding joining a potential class action lawsuit.

feed.title: MYPS Stock Price, News & Analysis

It highlights the company's free-to-play mobile and social games, unique loyalty platforms (playAWARDS and myVIP) that offer real-world rewards, and recent financial and corporate governance updates. The analysis also covers MYPS's stock performance, market capitalization, and compliance status with Nasdaq listing rules.
